calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF DEBRA WARD).

APPEARANCES: Debra Ward, 387-3035 defendant/judgment debtor in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: Defendant/judgment debtor presented bank statements to the Court. Upon further review and argument, the Court granted the claim of exemption. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Not reported
